A test script that verifies the sum of two variables equals 30.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that demonstrates a basic function call and an assertion. It defines a global variable `a` with a value of 10. The function [`foo`](<#01-001foo>) is declared, which contains a local variable `b` set to 20. Inside [`foo`](<#01-001foo>), an assertion checks if the sum of `a` and `b` equals 30. The function [`foo`](<#01-001foo>) is then called to execute this logic.
